{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":715},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7561779821922779928","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情太爽了，完全没有被原著剧情控制，该刀就刀，与自己做对的通通干掉，战力也合理，不过我最喜欢的还是有生孩子。像别的后宫文小说，哪怕开了后宫也跟绝育了似的，女人再多也没有后代，真就一群不是太监的太监，像这本小说，该找女人找女人，该生娃生娃，这才像个正常人。总之很好看，目前缺点就是太少了，不够看啊，作者快点更新，一天两章哪够看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760615574,"group_id":"7526097680460696600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6oHO4sOAQ7uzcF85CyEPan+bsh7O80esHP70rc297+Z","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3df8ea16a70a45108e7e3167b8e0377c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703423&x-signature=bUi%2B5uVfrFzYe7uQ%2BlBOz8Rrfas%3D","user_id":"3835533078562724","user_name":"喜欢畏芝的红莲圣焱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3835533078562724","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7526097680460696600","book_info":{"abstract":"【凯多之公台】【百兽集团工号002】【百兽海贼团副船长】【凯多心中白月光般的男人】【幻兽种】【和之国的终焉噩梦】

他有且唯一感兴趣的就是……
统治和之国，奴役和之国！！！

{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7571411796264256318","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，非无敌流，但有智谋，实力强大，非无脑硬刚。
后宫流，但非舔狗种马。虽然多女，但不是那种一看女人就走不动路的舔狗，所以本篇多女内容并不会引起不适。（个人觉得种马舔狗就十分恶心，几乎不看有cp的文）
而且关于女人的章节并不多，大部分都是发展计划，实力提升。
终于有个文没有跪舔罗宾，娜美等女性角色了，真不容易，继续保持。
并不是罗宾娜美等女角色不好，只是太多类似的文了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762858957,"group_id":"7526097680460696600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzaeBc7yGydUQfrIDkceDpPtGQ6vxNxcEWlgkgUv4ARi","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/159f9900adb246289f8f9a4d981648fb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706708&x-signature=iDZn98y2EJdtFDRq6%2BvuEjubclc%3D","user_id":"1011166452389815","user_name":"哦豁～没必要上纲上线"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1011166452389815","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7526097680460696600","book_info":{"abstract":"【凯多之公台】【百兽集团工号002】【百兽海贼团副船长】【凯多心中白月光般的男人】【幻兽种】【和之国的终焉噩梦】

有点小小的建议：
船长——凯多（只管打架就行）
副船长——雷洛（决定发展方向）
参谋长——烬（掌管各方情报）
水手长——杰克（负责船员训练）
秘书长——斯图西（负责财务生意）
防务长——奎因（武器研究生产）
厨师长——可以原创一个角色（生活管家后勤）
以上为最高层
之后就是各个番队长和副队长，这些都是本部船员
还有就是外围附属海贼团
